scripts.postollama:log:
echo '


 Closed - Please make sure your container is running!'
scripts.postollama:log:short: echo 'Closed - Please make sure your container is running!'
scripts.ollama:log:tofile: echo Running! Read the README of this package && bash -c 'docker logs -f ollama &>> ollama-log.log'
scripts.ollama:interactive: docker exec -it ollama ollama run llama3.1
